symptoms.symptom_name: Pervasive low, empty mood with anhedonia (loss of interest in gardening and grandchildren)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Core depressive symptoms — low mood and anhedonia are the two cardinal criteria.

symptoms.symptom_name: Complete refusal of food and fluids for ~24 hours

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Severe appetite/volitional collapse marks episode severity.
Voluntary starvation converts the psychiatric crisis into a converging medical emergency.

symptoms.symptom_name: Unintentional weight loss ~6 kg over 2 months with poor appetite

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Weight loss is a somatic criterion of depression.
Unintentional weight loss in an older adult mandates malignancy work-up.

symptoms.symptom_name: Early-morning awakening with inability to return to sleep

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Terminal insomnia (early-morning wakening) is characteristic of melancholic depression.
Marked psychomotor retardation indicates a severe/melancholic episode.

symptoms.symptom_name: Impaired concentration and indecision resembling cognitive decline (pseudodementia)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Effort/attention-based cognitive underperformance is typical of depressive pseudodementia.
Superficially mimics dementia but the effort-dependent pattern and mood prominence argue against it; cannot be excluded without cognitive assessment over time.

symptoms.symptom_name: Feelings of worthlessness and inappropriate guilt

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Excessive/inappropriate guilt is a diagnostic criterion and, with SI, a suicide-risk marker.

symptoms.symptom_name: Passive suicidal ideation with denial of active plan

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Suicidal ideation defines severity and drives the triage tier; passive SI in an isolated frail elder is high-risk despite denial of an active plan.
Validated scale confirming severe depression — administered in person by the nurse; sealed clinician instrument, not obtainable via chat.

symptoms.symptom_name: MoCA performance impaired by inattention/lack of effort rather than amnestic loss

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Effort-dependent pattern favours pseudodementia over primary dementia; formal cognitive testing cannot be delivered remotely.
Absence of a true amnestic pattern argues against primary dementia.

symptoms.symptom_name: Globally intact neurological examination with no focal deficits (responses delayed)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Intact neuro exam reduces likelihood of a focal neurological precipitant — a clinician examination the AI cannot perform.

symptoms.symptom_name: Normal baseline bloods anticipated to exclude medical mimics (FBC, CMP, TFTs, B12)

investigation_details.investigation_name: Depression medical-mimic screen (FBC, CMP/U&E, TFTs, B12)
investigation_details.expected_result: Anticipated normal/unremarkable, excluding hypothyroidism, anaemia, electrolyte derangement and B12 deficiency as primary drivers
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: A reversible medical mimic (hypothyroidism, occult infection, metabolic disturbance) could be missed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: TFTs are required to exclude hypothyroidism as a mimic — unavailable via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: No signs of self-inflicted injury on examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of self-injury is reassuring at this moment but does not lower the ongoing suicide risk; a body inspection the AI cannot perform.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Low mood + anhedonia + early-morning wakening + psychomotor retardation + guilt + suicidal ideation forms a melancholic, high-severity, high-risk cluster.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Converging medical emergency of voluntary starvation
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Dehydration / malnutrition risk in a frail elder
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Complete food/fluid refusal plus prior weight loss in a low-body-weight elder threatens acute dehydration, AKI and metabolic collapse independent of the psychiatric risk.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent bloods: FBC, CMP/U&E, TFTs, B12 (medical-mimic and dehydration screen)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Exclude hypothyroidism, anaemia, electrolyte derangement/AKI, infection and B12 deficiency; assess hydration — must be arranged in person, not obtainable remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person suicide risk assessment and mental state examination
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: A validated face-to-face risk assessment is required to determine safety and disposition; the AI cannot perform or substitute for it.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Occult malignancy work-up (guided by weight loss)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Significant unintentional weight loss warrants in-hours investigation for occult malignancy.
Antidepressant initiation and titration in a frail elder is a GP/specialist task after mimic exclusion and safety planning — not an AI telehealth action.
